sourceEmail.subject: Re: part two: mental health status exam rules

prompts.title: QuickNotes / Group Notes JSON
prompts.body: Return valid JSON only for the Rose ReliaTrax QuickNotes / Group Notes form. Use the field paths from the bundled QuickNotes field map. For every field you can answer, set either the friendly suggestedPath or the stable quicknotes.controls.<index> key. For checkbox and radio choices, return true only for the option that should be selected and false or omit the rest. Use concise clinical full sentences for textareas.

fieldMap.contextText: Rosalee Harris change Date: Notes for the full week will be loaded.
Tell me a bit about why you decided to our services?
Where are you currently living? (Is this the same or different than their current location?)

fieldMap.label: Check if NO history of substance use
fieldMap.contextText: Check if NO history of substance use
In general, how much were you using?
At any point of your use did you develop a tolerance?
What was the method of use (smoking, injecting, nasal, etc.)?
What was the date of last use?
How many days in the last 30 days did you use?
What is your most recent pattern of use and how long has this pattern been occurring?
Did you notice any behavioral changes in yourself when using this substance?
What were the consequences to using this substance? (Impacts on relationships/employment/health- physical or mental/legal problems)
In general, how much were you using?
At any point of your use did you develop a tolerance?
What was the method of use (smoking, injecting, nasal, etc.)?
What was the date of last use?
How many days in the last 30 days did you use?
What is your most recent pattern of use and how long has this pattern been occurring?
Did you notice any behavioral changes in yourself when using this substance?
What were the consequences to using this substance? (Impacts on relationships/employment/health- physical or mental/legal problems)
In general, how much were you using?
At any point of your use did you develop a tolerance?
What was the method of use (smoking, injecting, nasal, etc.)?
What was the date of last use?
How many days in the last 30 days did you use?

Did you notice any behavioral changes in yourself when using this substance?
What were the consequences to using this substance? (Impacts on relationships/employment/health- physical or mental/legal problems)

fieldMap.label: Check if NO history of Tobacco use
fieldMap.contextText: Check if NO history of Tobacco use
How much do you use and how often?
Have you tried to quit in the past?)

fieldMap.label: Check if NO history of Withdrawl
fieldMap.contextText: Check if NO history of Withdrawl
How long did your symptoms last?
How long after your last use did these symptoms begin?
How did you manage your withdrawal symptoms (detox, medication, etc.)?
How many times have you detoxed?
Total number of outpatient treatment episodes
What was that experience like for you?

fieldMap.label: Check if NO history of Mental Health
fieldMap.contextText: Check if NO history of Mental Health
Have you ever been given a mental health diagnosis? Is yes, state diagnosis.
How old were you when you were diagnosed?
Who were you diagnosed by (name, clinic, or type of professional)?
Were you using any substances at the time of your diagnosis?
If yes, do you believe your use impacted your diagnosis?

fieldMap.label: I am not interested in receiving any resources or referrals
fieldMap.contextText: I am not interested in receiving any resources or referrals
Have you ever received treatment or been in need of treatment for an eating disorder or disordered eating?
What was going on in your life when these thoughts have been especially difficult?
When did these thoughts occur (dates) and when did they occur most recently?
Can you describe the thoughts you experienced?
How many attempts have you had in your lifetime?
When did this attempt/these attempts occur (years/dates)? In what way(s) did you attempt suicide in the past?
Were you under the influence of drugs or alcohol at the time of the attempt(s)?
How do you feel about your past attempt(s) now?
What are the parts of your life that keep you from attempting suicide?
Is there anything that would push you towards a suicide attempt in the future?
When did you engage in this behavior (and when was the most recent time)?
In what ways did you engage in self-harm?
How do you feel about past self-harming now?
Do you have access to means to engage in self-harm?
How do those experiences impact your life now?
Are you interested in receiving any treatment regarding these experiences, if you have not already?
Are you currently experiencing any grief or loss?
If so, what are you currently grieving?
How many times throughout your life have you been arrested, if at all?
Have you ever been convicted of a sex crime?
What were the results of the arrest(s)? (E.g. jail time, probation, classes, etc.)
If deceased: When did she pass and what was the reason for her passing?
What is/was your relationship like with your mother? Are you in contact with her?
Does/did your mother have any history of medical conditions?
Does/did your mother have any history of mental health difficulties?
Does/did your mother have any history of substance abuse?
If deceased: When did he pass and what was the reason for his passing?
What is/was your relationship like with your father? Are you in contact with him?
Does/did your father have any history of medical conditions?
Does/did your father have any history of mental health difficulties?
Does/did your father have any history of substance abuse?
Are you affiliated with any religion?
If yes, would you consider yourself to be active in your religion?
Are you currently experiencing any physical health problems? (Note if terminal illnesses are present)
How does your pain impact your functioning?
Have you ever used opiates for pain?
If so, were these opiates prescribed?
Do you have a primary care physician or a primary doctor?
If so, what clinic do you go through?
if they are in private practice, what is your doctor's name?
When was the last time you saw a physician and had a full physical?
What occurs when you have an allergic reaction?
Do you have or need an epinephrine pen?
When do you plan to see a dentist next?
What is the dosage and frequency of use?
Are you experiencing any side effects? (If so, indicate what)
What is the dosage and frequency of use?
Are you experiencing any side effects? (If so, indicate what)
What is the dosage and frequency of use?
Are you experiencing any side effects? (If so, indicate what)
How many partners have you had in the last year?
Has your use of drugs or alcohol impacted your sex life? If so, how?
When did you start working there?
What is your hourly wage or annual income?
Are you full time or part time?
How many persons are living on your income?
How would you describe the current state of your finances?
Have you ever been in trouble at work due to your substance use? If so, what happened?
Did you like school when you were younger?
Do you have any diagnosed learning disabilities?
Were you involved in any clubs or sports when you were younger?
Did your use of drugs or alcohol ever interfere with school?
What is the highest rank you achieved?
Did your use of substances interfere with your time in the military?
If in a relationship or married: How long have you been married/in a relationship?
How would you describe the relationship?
Has your use of substances impacted your relationship with your partner?
Are there any substances in your partner's living space?
Is there current involvement with child protective services? (If so take note of case worker's name and phone number)
Any other relevant information about CPS case):
Who are the people who support you in your recovery?
